name: Wazuh SOC Dashboard STABLE CPY v12.9.12

nodes.name: If
nodes.notes: true=external IP level>=7 full pipeline | false=localhost/private/low-level normalize then silent log

parameters.body: =from(bucket: "alerts") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.source_ip == "{{ $('Extract IP Address').first().json.sourceIP }}") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rule_level") |> group(columns: []) |> count() |> yield(name: "count")

=from(bucket: "alerts") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.source_ip == "{{ $('Extract IP Address').first().json.sourceIP }}") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rule_level") |> group(columns: []) |> count() |> yield(name: "count")

=from(bucket: "alerts") |> range(start: -7d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.source_ip == "{{ $('Extract IP Address').first().json.sourceIP }}") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rule_level") |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1) |> yield(name: "last")

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { success: true, message: 'Alert processed and stored in InfluxDB', influxdb_written: true } };

parameters.body:
=from(bucket: "alerts")
  |> range(start: -300s)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telegram_sent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decision == "{{ $('AI Decision Engine').first().json.decision }}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.agent == "{{ $('AI Decision Engine').first().json.agent?.name || 'unknown' }}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sent")
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> count()
  |> yield(name: "count")

from(bucket: "alerts")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "chat_id": "{{ $json.employee_chat_id }}", "parse_mode": "HTML", "text": "⚠️ SECURITY ALERT FROM IT Hello, we have detected a critical security issue on your computer ({{ $json.isolation_target_agent }}). To keep the company network safe, we have temporarily paused your internet and network access. What you need to do: 1. Do not panic. 2. Save any offline work you are doing right now. 3. Do not restart your computer. 4. Wait for the IT/Security team to contact you directly. Thank you for your cooperation!" }

={ "chat_id": "{{ $json.chat_id }}", "parse_mode": "HTML", "text": "🛡️ SOC SECURITY ONBOARDING Welcome, {{ $json.first_name }}. To protect your laptop, please provide your Registration ID to the IT Administrator. Your Registration ID is: {{ $json.chat_id }} Copy this number and send it to your SOC Analyst. IGNORE THIS MESSAGE IF YOU HAVE ALREADY DONE THIS PROCESS." }
